headline: One Member Turned Volatility Into 536% in a Day… Here’s How We Spot the Next Market Meltdown Winner
summary: Before the opening bell on Monday, a member of our Discord community – Greg (.odd.1.) – spotted something unusual in the options market. Institutional traders had been quietly accumulating options on the Invesco QQQ Trust over the past few weeks. And the flow suggested that something bigger might be brewing beneath the surface. Once he discovered the signal, he realized there was one big catch…InvestorPlace - Stock Market News, Stock Advice & Trading Tips Between rising geopolitical tensions inv
